children.name: RegisterPatient
children.purpose: Register a new patient in the system
children.behavior: Extract patient details from input, validate uniqueness, store in patients data store, and return success or error

semantic_outputs.name: output
semantic_outputs.description: JSON with success status, patient ID, and message

postconditions: patient is stored in patients data store

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Check uniqueness and store new patient record

outputs.name: output
outputs.description: JSON with success status, patient ID, and message

children.name: BookAppointment
children.purpose: Book an appointment for a registered patient
children.behavior: Extract patient ID and appointment details, verify patient exists, check slot availability, store appointment, and return confirmation

semantic_inputs.name: input
semantic_inputs.description: JSON with patient ID and appointment details

semantic_outputs.name: output
semantic_outputs.description: JSON with success status, appointment ID, and message

postconditions: appointment is stored in appointments data store

call_inputs.name: input
call_inputs.description: JSON with patient ID and appointment details

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Check slot availability and store new appointment

outputs.name: output
outputs.description: JSON with success status, appointment ID, and message

children.name: GetRecords
children.purpose: Retrieve medical records for a patient
children.behavior: Extract patient ID, verify patient exists, fetch records from patients data store, and return records

semantic_outputs.name: output
semantic_outputs.description: JSON with success status, records data, and message

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Verify patient exists and fetch medical records

outputs.name: output
outputs.description: JSON with success status, records data, and message

children.name: UpdateProfile
children.behavior: Extract patient ID and updated fields, verify patient exists, update profile in patients data store, and return confirmation

semantic_inputs.name: input
semantic_inputs.description: JSON with patient ID and updated profile fields

semantic_outputs.name: output
semantic_outputs.description: JSON with success status, updated profile, and message

preconditions: input contains valid fields to update
postconditions: patient profile is updated in patients data store

call_inputs.name: input
call_inputs.description: JSON with patient ID and updated profile fields

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Verify patient exists and update profile fields

outputs.name: output
outputs.description: JSON with success status, updated profile, and message

dataflow_edges.note: parent passes registration data to RegisterPatient
parent passes booking data to BookAppointment
parent passes patient ID to GetRecords
parent passes update data to UpdateProfile

interface_audit.identity_preservation_detail: All four child names (RegisterPatient, BookAppointment, GetRecords, UpdateProfile) are preserved exactly as in Stage 1. No children were added, deleted, renamed, or reordered.
interface_audit.semantic_preservation_detail: All Stage 1 fields (purpose, behavior, boundary, preconditions, postconditions, guarantees, composition_role) are copied verbatim. No semantic changes were introduced.
interface_audit.call_signature_detail: Each child's signature contains only the 'input' parameter from call_inputs, which is the sole parameter the parent passes. Internal data store accesses are excluded from signatures.
interface_audit.internal_leaf_separation_detail: Data store accesses (patients, appointments) are listed under internal_leaf_accesses, not call_inputs. This ensures resources are not exposed in the Python signature, maintaining proper encapsulation.
interface_audit.dataflow_schema_detail: All dataflow edges connect 'parent' to child names or child names to 'parent'. No resource names (patients, appointments) appear as from_node/to_node, complying with the rule.
